content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows mild weakness across indices (Nifty -0.38%, Bank Nifty -0.47%) on weak US close (Dow -0.63%). VIX at 16.62 elevated but not panic. Book is +1.38% unrealized today with 11 holdings up materially since entry — focus is on locking gains via trailing SLs. Deployment at 54% with ~₹260K remaining capacity; CAMS, ABCAPITAL, MARICO are qualifying BULLISH watchlist names not yet sized.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL 1035 is at breakeven+ already given +7.6% gain. CMP 1059, SL 1035 = 2.3% gap (above 1% trail floor). Bearish engulfing + doji on 5/4-5/5 suggests consolidation; not raising SL further to give room for the 1110 target. No-op MODIFY — actually emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.6% gain, SL 1035 = +5.2% from entry (locked profit). Target 1110 still ~5% away. Doji/bearish-engulfing recent suggests consolidation; let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slight unrealized loss -0.5%; SL 121 = 3.2% below CMP, target 135 intact. Gold consolidating near upper range, structural backdrop supportive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1735 already at +2.05% above entry, but CMP 1740 puts SL only 0.3% below CMP — VIOLATES 1% trail-gap rule (Rule under MODIFY). Loosening SL to ~1721 (1.1% below CMP) would be a LOOSENING which is rejected. Therefore the right action is HOLD-as-is and accept the tight gap; emitting unchanged values means HOLD. Switching to HOLD entry below."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 sits only 0.3% below CMP 1740 — uncomfortably tight but cannot be loosened (guardrail). Promoter 2% block sale is overhang but Capital Group as buyer is constructive. If stopped out today, accept it; otherwise let runner go to 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4699.10,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 4699 (+2.7% above entry). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% unrealized, SL 4699 = +2.7% locked. CMP 4794 vs SL 4699 = 2.0% gap (above 1% floor, OK). May 14 Q4 board meeting is a binary in 4 sessions — currently within the 5-session warning window but Rule 11 specifies 3 sessions. Will revisit Day-21 (May 11) for either tighten-to-2-3% or pre-event exit. Today: hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already 6960 (+0.9% above entry). Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 vs CMP 7049 = 1.3% gap (above 1% floor). +2.2% unrealized, target 7400 = +5.0% upside. R-32 pricing tailwind + CDMO ramp intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.5%. SL 836 vs CMP 842 = 0.7% gap — BELOW 1% trail floor but already at breakeven and cannot loosen. Q4 results pending May (date TBD) — binary risk window opens. If date confirmed within 3 sessions, will exit/trim Day-20."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just-entered (0% P&L). SL 365 (-1.1%), target 388 (+5.1%), R:R ~4.7. Q4 strong (+30.6% PAT YoY), Macquarie TP 415. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, SL 815 vs CMP 832 = 2.0% gap. Q4 done (+22% revenue, +14-18% PAT), no near-term binary. Target 860 = +3.4% away. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, SL 1260 = +0.1% above entry, CMP 1279 — gap 1.5% (above floor). Q4 done (+134% PAT, +30% rev), 10% upper circuit on May 6. Multiple brokerage TPs 1690-2200. Hold to target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.5%, SL 3025 at breakeven, CMP 3101 = 2.5% gap. May 12 concall is a near-binary in 4 sessions — outside 3-session window today, will revisit Day-21. Q4 already announced, so concall is guidance not earnings binary. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.7%, SL 806 at breakeven, CMP 835 = 3.6% gap. Note: research surfaced -0.05 modifier (lagging KFin, SEBI TER overhang) — softer thesis than entry. But Q4 fine, no binary. Hold but flag for review if fades below 820."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 369.00,
      "stop_loss": 365.00,
      "target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "DUPLICATE — already held at avg 369 with same SL/target. Removing — see HOLD entry above."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+5%, recent doji/bearish-engulfing argues for consolidation; let trade work."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Slight loss, structurally bullish backdrop, SL gives 3.2% room."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1735.00, "reasoning": "SL already locked +2.05%; cannot loosen. Tight 0.3% gap to CMP — accept early stop-out risk."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4699.10, "reasoning": "+2.7% locked. May 14 binary 4 sessions out — revisit Day-21 within 3-session rule."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven+ SL, 1.3% gap to CMP, target 7400 intact."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 836.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL, Q4 date TBD — monitor for binary window."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 365.00, "reasoning": "Fresh entry; -1.1% SL, +5.1% target. Strong Q4 thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 815.00, "reasoning": "Q4 done, no binary, +1.5% locked via SL near entry."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1260.00, "reasoning": "+1.6%, SL at breakeven, 1.5% gap to CMP, multiple brokerage TPs higher."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3025.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL, May 12 concall in 4 sessions, will revisit Day-21."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 806.00, "reasoning": "+3.7%, breakeven SL with 3.6% gap. Softer research read but no binary; watch for fade below 820."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewing qualifying BULLISH candidates not added (Rule 18 audit): WOCKPHARMA (+0.05) — high debt, USFDA history, exceptional items in FY26, post-19.5% rally over 4 sessions = chasing extension; reject on quality/risk. SOBHA (+0.10) — REJECT under Rule 14 (5-session re-entry cooldown — was held earlier; need to verify exit date). GABRIEL (0.0 modifier, board meeting May 13 in 3 sessions) — REJECT under Rule 11 (binary within 3 sessions, sub-0.70 conf disqualifies as event-trade). KPIL/LAURUSLABS/POLYCAB/HDFCBANK/LUPIN/BHEL — not in fresh research batch with confidence modifiers, defer. Already hold 11 names; book is deployed at 54%, remaining capacity ~₹260K. Not adding for the sake of adding — but actively monitoring for clean BULLISH setups without binary windows. HFCL OPEN order from prior session needs review — placing CANCEL below.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is performing: 11 holdings, 10 in profit, +₹13,963 unrealized today, +1.38%. SL discipline note: ADANIPORTS and TITAGARH have SLs uncomfortably close to CMP (<1% gap) but cannot be loosened per guardrail — accepting potential early stopouts as the trade-off for locked profits. HAL (May 14) and GRSE (May 12) approach the 3-session binary window on Day-21; will pre-commit to either tighten-to-2% or partial trim then. Daily P&L limit ₹75,809 — well within. Net cash idle ₹462K (45.8%) — keeping powder dry for fresh setups without binary overhang. HFCL pending MIS BUY from a prior day must be cancelled (stale, 52+ hours old)."
}
